text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
author: Steve Jobs

text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
author: Winston Churchill

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

text: Every expert was once a beginner.
author: Helen Hayes

text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
author: Sam Levenson

text: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
author: Anonymous

text: Dream bigger. Do bigger.
author: Anonymous

text: You are capable of more than you know.
author: E.O. Wilson

text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
author: John Johnson

text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
author: Martin Fowler

text: The best code is no code at all.
author: Jeff Atwood

text: Programming isn't about what you know; it's about what you can figure out.
author: Chris Pine

text: Debugging is twice as hard as writing the code in the first place.
author: Brian Kernighan

text: The most dangerous phrase in programming: 'It should work.'
author: Anonymous

text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
author: Linus Torvalds

text: Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad.
author: Cory House

text: One of the best programming skills you can have is knowing when to walk away for a while.
author: Oscar Godson

text: Weeks of programming can save you hours of planning.
author: Anonymous

text: An algorithm must be seen to be believed.
author: Donald Knuth

text: The function of good software is to make the complex appear to be simple.
author: Grady Booch

text: Every line of code you write is a gift to the future developer — make it count.
author: Anonymous

text: Don't write comments for what the code does — write comments for why.
author: Jeff Atwood

text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
author: Kent Beck

text: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Mathematics is the language with which God has written the universe.
author: Galileo Galilei

text: Pure mathematics is, in its way, the poetry of logical ideas.
author: Albert Einstein

text: Math is not about following directions, it's about making new directions.
author: Po-Shen Loh

text: Without mathematics, there's nothing you can do. Everything around you is mathematics.
author: Shakuntala Devi

text: In mathematics, the art of proposing a question must be held of higher value than solving it.
author: Georg Cantor

text: Calculus works by making visible the infinitesimally small.
author: Keith Devlin

text: Go down deep enough into anything and you will find mathematics.
author: Dean Schlicter

text: Mathematics is not about numbers, equations, computations, or algorithms: it is about understanding.
author: William Paul Thurston

text: The only way to learn mathematics is to do mathematics.
author: Paul Halmos

text: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
author: Thomas Edison

text: Learning never exhausts the mind.
author: Leonardo da Vinci

text: Tell me and I forget. Teach me and I remember. Involve me and I learn.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire.
author: W.B. Yeats

text: The more that you read, the more things you will know.
author: Dr. Seuss

text: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance.
author: Confucius

text: The capacity to learn is a gift; the ability to learn is a skill; the willingness to learn is a choice.
author: Brian Herbert

text: Knowledge is power. But enthusiasm pulls the switch.
author: Ivern Ball

text: The beautiful thing about learning is nobody can take it away from you.
author: B.B. King

text: The secret of success is to do the common thing uncommonly well.
author: John D. Rockefeller

text: Vision without execution is hallucination.
author: Thomas Edison

text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe

text: Ideas are easy. Implementation is hard.
author: Guy Kawasaki

text: Projects don't fail at the end. They fail at the beginning.
author: Anonymous

text: A goal without a timeline is just a dream.
author: Robert Herjavec

text: Done is better than perfect.
author: Sheryl Sandberg

text: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese Proverb

text: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: Shipping beats perfection. A good plan executed now is better than a perfect plan next week.
author: George Patton (adapted)

text: Rest when you're weary. Refresh and renew yourself, your body, your mind, your spirit.
author: Ralph Marston

text: Almost everything will work again if you unplug it for a few minutes, including you.
author: Anne Lamott

text: Take care of your body. It's the only place you have to live.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Burnout is what happens when you try to avoid being human for too long.
author: Michael Gungor

text: Pushing through burnout only makes it worse. Rest is productive.
author: Anonymous

text: The race is long and, in the end, it is only with yourself.
author: Mary Schmich

text: Champions aren't made in the gyms. Champions are made from something deep inside them.
author: Muhammad Ali

text: I hated every minute of training, but I said, 'Don't quit. Suffer now and live the rest of your life as a champion.'
author: Muhammad Ali

text: The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

text: When it is obvious that the goals cannot be reached, don't adjust the goals, adjust the action steps.
author: Confucius

text: The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little 'extra'.
author: Jimmy Johnson

text: If you can dream it, you can achieve it. But only if you outwork everyone else.
author: Anonymous

text: Mastery is not about perfection. It's about dedication to the craft.
author: Anonymous

text: You mastered difficulty 9/10. That's elite territory. Most people quit at 6.
author: AI Planner

text: Hard problems are where legends are made.
author: Anonymous

text: Your deadline is tomorrow. This is where champions separate from the rest.
author: Anonymous

text: Under pressure, diamonds are made. You're being pressed into brilliance.
author: Anonymous

text: Deadlines are not the enemy — they are the architect of your best work.
author: Anonymous

text: When the night is darkest, the stars are brightest. Keep going.
author: Anonymous

text: Midnight oil is the fuel of champions.
author: Anonymous

text: The early morning has gold in its mouth.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: Morning is when the seed of the day is planted. Plant it with purpose.
author: Anonymous

text: Rise up, start fresh, see the bright opportunity in each new day.
author: Anonymous

text: Afternoon slumps are temporary. Your goals are permanent.
author: Anonymous

text: The afternoon is when the real work gets done. Everyone else has quit by now.
author: Anonymous

text: Evening reflection makes tomorrow's morning powerful.
author: Anonymous

text: Celebrate today's progress. Tomorrow, push further.
author: Anonymous

text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

text: Algorithms are the foundation. If your algorithms are weak, your system is weak.
author: Anonymous

text: Data structures are the DNA of every great software system.
author: Anonymous

text: Every great developer you know got there by solving problems they were unqualified to solve.
author: Patrick McKenzie

text: The computer was born to solve problems that did not exist before.
author: Bill Gates

text: Software is a great combination of artistry and engineering.
author: Bill Gates

text: Measuring programming progress by lines of code is like measuring aircraft building progress by weight.
author: Bill Gates

text: Great things in business are never done by one person. They're done by a team.
author: Steve Jobs

text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
author: Steve Jobs

text: The biggest risk is not taking any risk.
author: Mark Zuckerberg

text: Move fast and learn things. Break nothing important.
author: Anonymous

text: If you're offered a seat on a rocket ship, you don't ask what seat.
author: Sheryl Sandberg

text: Statistics is the grammar of science.
author: Karl Pearson

text: Without data, you're just another person with an opinion.
author: W. Edwards Deming

text: In God we trust; all others must bring data.
author: W. Edwards Deming

text: Algebra is the intellectual instrument which has been created for rendering clear the quantitative aspects of the world.
author: Alfred North Whitehead

text: Number theory is the queen of mathematics.
author: Carl Friedrich Gauss

text: The noblest pleasure is the joy of understanding.
author: Leonardo da Vinci

text: Curiosity is the engine of achievement.
author: Ken Robinson

text: To teach is to learn twice.
author: Joseph Joubert

text: Education is not preparation for life; education is life itself.
author: John Dewey

text: The mind is not a vessel to be filled but a fire to be kindled.
author: Plutarch

text: I am always ready to learn although I do not always like being taught.
author: Winston Churchill

text: You don't understand anything until you learn it more than one way.
author: Marvin Minsky

text: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
author: Thomas Edison

text: Continuous improvement is better than delayed perfection.
author: Mark Twain

text: Small daily improvements over time lead to stunning results.
author: Robin Sharma

text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
author: Robert Collier
